title: Evangelion Live Orchestral Performances
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Live Orchestral Performances             Quote Post by LelouchR2 » Sun May 29, 2011 1:18 am Hey guys. I just absolutely love the music composed for Evangelion by Shiro Sagisu. Sadly, I am unable to find any live performance videos from him or anyone else. Does anyone out there by chnace have any links to share of live performances? I'd greatly appreciate it :).

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sun May 29, 2011 8:59 am Here's one example. Does it absolutely have to be live recordings? Because there's an album - Evangelion Symphony - that's all orchestral covers, and that's just as symphonic and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by LelouchR2 » Mon May 30, 2011 12:20 pm Thank you for that link. It was wonderful. Yea the thing is I'm the type of person that likes to see the music in action. Like the Black Mages for example

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Nov 06, 2011 5:55 pm I tweeted this already but it's worth a post here. Found this guy who uploaded a bunch of excerpts from "Evangelion Symphony" http://www.youtube.com/user/transylvania06
